Appointment Type Groups

Each group binds a set of positions to the appointment types that show on the schedule. A position can belong to multiple groups; users in multiple groups get a group picker on the schedule. Users whose position is not in any group cannot load the schedule.

Auto-Refresh

How often the schedule reloads automatically when the window has focus. Set to 0 (or use the toggle) to disable.

@if (refreshIntervalSeconds() === 0) { Auto-refresh disabled } @else { Allowed: {{ minRefreshInterval }}–{{ maxRefreshInterval }}s }

Chart Link Default Encounter

When an appointment has no encounter attached yet, the chart-open link falls back to the patient's most recent active encounter of this type. The appointment's encounter and encounter type stay blank — this only affects the chart link's target.
